description: Multi-phase plans currently in flight. Each phase references roadmap item titles; the activePhase section breaks the current phase into concrete tasks with status. Survives conversation compactions — a fresh session can pick up by reading this file.

phases.title: Plugin runtime — manifest, SDK, federation hooks
roadmapItems: Plugin runtime — manifest format, loader, SDK, federation hooks
phases.notes: Shipped. PluginManifest / definePlugin / server + client loaders / auto-mounted federation routes / hello-world reference plugin.

phases.title: Polls & Quizzes plugin — first SDK consumer
roadmapItems: Polls & Quizzes — first plugin (validates simple SDK case)
phases.notes: Shipped end-to-end: schema migrations, REST routes, federation handler, real-time sync via babelr:ws custom event, translation wired manually (to be automated in Phase 3), list-detail view via the new ListDetailView primitive, sidebar-slot button opens the view.

phases.title: SDK gap-closure based on polls implementation
roadmapItems: Translation as default for plugin content — zero-config primitive
phases.notes: All four in-scope tasks shipped: component ergonomics (ComponentType + createElement), translation-by-default (<T>), WS helper (onWsMessage), and documented the server-safe/client-only file-split convention. Plugin authors now have one-liners for the friction points polls exposed. Phase 4 (project management) starts on a smoother SDK. Deferred items persisted to roadmap: 'Plugin SDK — stable re-exports of @babelr/client utilities' (P2, ships with Phase 5), 'Plugin DB abstraction — helper over drizzle for plugin tables' (P3, revisit after PM), 'Plugin test harness — standard pattern for plugin unit + integration tests' (P2, builds alongside PM), and cross-Tower voting is already covered by 'Validate polls federation across two-Tower staging' (P2).

phases.title: Project management plugin — complex SDK consumer
roadmapItems: Project management — second plugin (validates complex SDK case)
phases.notes: Shipped. 9 tasks: schema + CRUD, board list + kanban view, work item CRUD + sidebar preview, DnD reordering, comment threads (useChat), task + board embeds, real-time WS sync, AS2 federation (plugin inbox dispatch hook + outbound delivery + inbound handling), polish pass. SDK additions: <E> component, PluginInboxHandler, fastify.deliverToGroupFollowers. Roadmap item added for e2e federation testing on live Towers.

phases.title: Plugin distribution — npm packaging, admin install, manifest freeze
roadmapItems: Plugin distribution — npm packaging, admin install flow, manifest freeze
Plugin SDK — stable re-exports of @babelr/client utilities
Plugin test harness — standard pattern for plugin unit + integration tests
phases.notes: Polls + PM prove the contract works end-to-end. Phase 5 freezes the manifest, ships npm packaging so third-party authors can build/distribute plugins, and batches the SDK re-export + test harness deferred items. Circle back after MVP gaps are closed.

phases.title: Market-MVP gaps — onboarding, PWA, email verification, 2FA
roadmapItems: First-run onboarding flow — guided server creation + language preference
PWA support — installable web app + offline shell as a quick mobile path
phases.notes: Done. All four shipped: onboarding wizard (5-step), PWA (vite-plugin-pwa), email verification (nodemailer + SMTP), 2FA (TOTP + recovery codes).

phases.title: UX refinement — migrate overlays to views, build component primitives
roadmapItems: UX: migrate modal overlays to view registry for mobile-ready layout
UX: component primitives palette (TabbedView, ScrollListView, SidePanel)
phases.notes: 14 surfaces still use the old modal-overlay pattern from before the View/Sidebar paradigm. Mobile-hostile (no responsive layout, no back-gesture). Migrate the full-panel surfaces to registered views, build reusable primitives plugin authors can leverage, and make MemberList the default right-panel when no sidebar content is active.

activePhase.title: UX refinement — migrate overlays to views, build component primitives
activePhase.goal: Every full-panel surface uses the view registry. Every right-panel surface uses a standard SidePanel primitive. ChatView's show* state explosion is replaced by view IDs. Plugin authors get TabbedView, ScrollListView, and SidePanel out of the box. MemberList becomes the default right panel (Discord/Slack pattern). Mobile layout follows naturally once everything routes through views.
activePhase.sequencing: Primitives first (TabbedView, ScrollListView, SidePanel) so the migration has something to target. Then migrate surfaces in dependency order: settings (most complex, validates TabbedView), server settings, channel settings, then the simpler panels.

tasks.title: Component primitives — TabbedView, ScrollListView, SidePanel
tasks.resolution:
Three primitives built alongside ListDetailView.

TabbedView: tab bar with role='tablist' + content panel. Supports controlled (activeTab prop) and uncontrolled (internal state) modes. Tabs horizontally scroll on narrow viewports via overflow-x: auto. Active tab gets a blue bottom border.

ScrollListView: scrollable list with sticky header, optional search filter, empty/loading states, load-more pagination. Lighter than ListDetailView — single column, no detail panel.

SidePanel: right-side panel (300px default, 400px wide variant). Escape-to-close via keydown listener. Header with title + close button, scrollable body.

All three match the dark theme, use flex layout with min-height: 0 for proper overflow.
tasks.details:
Build three reusable primitives exported alongside ListDetailView for plugin authors and internal use.

TabbedView<T>: tab bar + content panel. Props: tabs array (id, label, icon?), activeTab, onTabChange, renderContent(tabId). Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes. CSS handles horizontal scroll on mobile for many tabs.

ScrollListView: scrollable list with sticky header, optional search filter, empty state, loading state. Lighter than ListDetailView — no detail panel, just a single column. Used for mentions, audit log, notifications.

SidePanel: right-side panel that overlays or sits beside the chat. Props: title, onClose, children. Manages its own width, close button, escape-to-close. Used for MemberList, ThreadPanel, GlossaryEditor. MemberList becomes the default content when no other SidePanel is active.

All three get CSS that works in the existing dark theme and responds to narrow viewports.

tasks.title: Register settings view — user settings + profile as TabbedView
tasks.resolution: SettingsPanel refactored into TabbedView with three tabs: Profile (absorbs ProfilePanel — avatar, display name, bio), Translation (provider selection, API keys, language, toggle), Account (password change, 2FA). Registered as 'settings' view in register-builtin.ts. ChatView's showSettings + showProfile state + modal overlays removed — both buttons now call openView('settings'). ViewHostContext gains onActorUpdate so views that modify the actor can propagate changes up to App. SettingsPanel now calls useTranslationSettings() directly instead of receiving settings/onUpdate as props. 3 i18n strings for tab labels.
tasks.details: Migrate SettingsPanel from a modal overlay to a registered 'settings' view using TabbedView. Tabs: Profile (display name, avatar, summary — absorbs ProfilePanel), Language & Translation (provider, preferred language), Account (password, 2FA, email verification status), About (app version, links). Remove showSettings + showProfile state from ChatView. The sidebar 'Settings' button now calls openView('settings') instead of toggling a boolean. SettingsPanel and ProfilePanel merge into one view component.

tasks.title: Register server settings view — TabbedView with roles + audit
tasks.resolution: ServerSettingsPanel refactored to use TabbedView with 4 tabs: Info (name, tagline, description, logo, tags), Invites, Roles (RolesPanel), Audit Log (absorbed AuditLogPanel inline). Registered as 'server-settings' view. ChatView showServerSettings + showAuditLog state removed — both sidebar buttons now call openView('server-settings'). ServerSettingsView fetches the full ServerView via new api.getServer(id) since the view host only has ServerSummary. 1 new i18n string (serverSettings.tabAudit).
tasks.details: Migrate ServerSettingsPanel from a modal overlay to a registered 'server-settings' view using TabbedView. Tabs: General (name, tagline, description, delete), Invites (create/manage invite links), Roles (existing RolesPanel), Audit Log (existing AuditLogPanel). Remove showServerSettings + showAuditLog state from ChatView. Sidebar 'Server Settings' gear icon calls openView('server-settings'). AuditLogPanel becomes a tab, not a standalone surface.

tasks.title: Register channel settings view — TabbedView
tasks.resolution: ChannelSettingsPanel refactored to use TabbedView with one tab (General). Ready for a Permissions tab when per-channel overrides ship. Registered as 'channel-settings' view with channelId passed via viewState. ChatView editingChannelId state + modal overlay removed — channel gear icon now calls openView('channel-settings', { channelId }). ChannelSettingsView resolves the channel from host.channels. 1 new i18n string.
tasks.details: Migrate ChannelSettingsPanel from a modal overlay to a registered 'channel-settings' view using TabbedView. Tabs: General (name, topic, private/public, delete), Permissions (per-channel overrides when they ship). Remove editingChannelId state from ChatView. Channel gear icon calls openView('channel-settings', { channelId }).

tasks.title: SidePanel — MemberList as default, ThreadPanel + GlossaryEditor
tasks.resolution: Unified right-panel slot in ChatView layout. Priority order: EmbedSidebar > Thread (SidePanel wide) > Glossary (SidePanel) > MemberList (SidePanel, default when in a server and no view active). MemberList refactored from modal overlay to inline content (settings-overlay wrapper removed, body renders directly in SidePanel). showMembers state removed — MemberList is always-visible default. ThreadPanel + GlossaryEditor render inside SidePanel wrappers. Three modal overlays eliminated.
tasks.details: Replace the three right-side overlays (MemberList, ThreadPanel, GlossaryEditor) with SidePanel wrappers. MemberList becomes the default SidePanel content — always visible when no embed sidebar, thread, or glossary is open (mirrors Discord's member list behavior). ThreadPanel and GlossaryEditor render inside SidePanel when triggered, pushing MemberList out. EmbedSidebar already has this slot; unify with SidePanel so there's one right-panel manager. Remove showMembers + showGlossary state from ChatView.

tasks.title: Migrate remaining surfaces — FriendsPanel, MentionsPanel
tasks.resolution: FriendsPanel stripped of settings-overlay, now uses scroll-list-* CSS classes with add-friend form above the list. Registered as 'friends' view (icon: 👥, always available). MentionsPanel refactored to use ScrollListView primitive — cleanest migration yet. Registered as 'mentions' view (icon: @). ChatView showFriends + showMentions state removed. Friends button calls openView('friends'), mentions button calls openView('mentions'). 1 new i18n string.
tasks.details: FriendsPanel → registered 'friends' view using ListDetailView (friend list on left, actions/profile on right). MentionsPanel → registered 'mentions' view using ScrollListView. Remove showFriends + showMentions state from ChatView. Both get sidebar buttons via the view registry's auto-toolbar.

tasks.title: ChatView cleanup — remove show* state, wire view toolbar
tasks.resolution: Auto-toolbar: ChannelSidebar now receives viewEntries (filtered by isAvailable) + onOpenView instead of individual onShowCalendar/onShowWiki/onShowFiles callbacks. The sidebar iterates viewEntries to render buttons — plugin views that set isAvailable automatically get sidebar entries. ChatView clutter: removed 8 comment lines for removed imports/state, collapsed state declarations. Remaining show* states are legitimate quick-action modals (createServer, createChannel, newDM, channelInvite) + the glossary SidePanel slot toggle. Import block cleaned up.
tasks.details: After all surfaces are migrated, ChatView should have zero show* booleans. All panel switching routes through activeViewId + the view registry. The sidebar auto-generates toolbar entries from listViews() — each view's icon + label appears as a sidebar button, replacing the hardcoded button list. Plugin views (polls, PM) automatically get sidebar entries if they set isAvailable. This closes the 'sidebar entries iterate the view registry' roadmap item.

tasks.title: Polish — responsive breakpoints, mobile gestures, SDK export
tasks.resolution: Responsive CSS: tablet breakpoint (≤1024px) hides side panel. Mobile breakpoint (≤768px) shrinks server sidebar to 52px icon strip, channel sidebar becomes absolute-positioned drawer with shadow, side panel fills full width as overlay, embed sidebar fills 100%, compact channel header + message input, onboarding card full-width borderless, auth form full-width. Views that fill the chat panel auto-hide the channel sidebar via :has() selector. SDK export: packages/client/src/primitives.ts barrel file re-exports ListDetailView, TabbedView, ScrollListView, SidePanel, T, E + all prop types. Subpath export @babelr/client/primitives added to package.json. Mobile gestures deferred — needs a routing layer for proper back navigation, tracked as task-ux-responsive-native.
tasks.details: Add responsive CSS: on narrow viewports (<768px), the left sidebar collapses to icons, the channel sidebar becomes a drawer, views fill the screen. Back gesture (swipe right) returns to the previous view. Export TabbedView, ScrollListView, SidePanel, and ListDetailView from the plugin SDK as stable primitives. Update the manual wiki page on available components.

deferred.title: Full responsive layout + Capacitor native shell
deferred.reason: The view migration + responsive breakpoints give us a mobile-usable PWA. Full native (Capacitor) is a separate effort once the PWA proves out the mobile UX.
